headline: Give agents an allowance, not the keys.
subheadline: Vajra is a non-custodial allowance vault for Solana automated signers.
proofThesis: Raw key drains. Vajra survives. Anyone can verify it.
coreInvariant: The SPL vault authority is the Vajra PolicyPDA, not the agent key.

integrationNotes.devnet: cached public devnet proof artifacts are available in proofs/devnet-*
integrationNotes.fixtures: latest receipts and red-team comparison are deterministic fixture artifacts
